nasb.text: I also clothed you with embroidered cloth and put sandals of porpoise skin on your feet; and I wrapped you with fine linen and covered you with silk.

esv.text: I clothed you also with embroidered cloth and shod you with fine leather. I wrapped you in fine linen and covered you with silk.

cnv.text: 我使你身穿刺繡的衣裳，腳穿海狗皮鞋；用細麻布給你裹頭；又用絲綢給你披在身上。

ccb.text: 穿上锦绣的衣裳和海狗皮的鞋，披上细麻衣和丝绸外袍。
